raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The state budget has appropriated $2 million towards the Warner Center Transportation Technology Infrastructure and Innovation Zone (TTIIZ).",
    "TTIIZ is a first-of-its-kind center designed to support cutting-edge transportation and mobility technology.",
    "The funding from the state will help create jobs and strengthen the innovation ecosystem in the San Fernando Valley.",
    "The TTIIZ encourages transportation-related businesses to start up, locate, and hire locally.",
    "The TTIIZ aims to spur job creation and progress on sustainability, equity, and economic growth in the transportation technology sector.",
    "The TTIIZ has transformed Warner Center into one of Los Angeles’ mobility innovation and workforce development hubs.",
    "The first pilot project at TTIIZ was a zero-emission last-mile delivery service connecting individuals sheltered at home by the pandemic to food from local businesses.",
    "The second pilot project launched in the TTIIZ featured mini-mobility hubs throughout the Warner Center campus."
  ]
}
```
